title: lonicera chrysantha var. koehneana
intro: Lonicera chrysantha var. koehneana, also known as the Yellow Honeysuckle, is a plant species within the honeysuckle family that is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lonicera chrysantha var. koehneana include its ability to reduce fever, relieve coughs, and treat digestive issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Lonicera chrysantha var. koehneana typically involve drying the flowers and leaves, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
